description: A clear sky and some deep water appear 'shilu'. Dyed cloth can show the same color. Calm and sadness require context and other words; the hue alone supplies neither.
articulatory_notes: Raise the tongue blade toward the postalveolar region for voiceless 'sh', then move into high-front 'i'. Touch the tongue tip to the alveolar ridge for lateral 'l' before rounded high-back 'u'. Stress falls on 'shi'.
usage_notes: 'nuelo shilu' is dark blue; 'whilo shilu' is pale blue.

semantic_domains.aesthetic: blue on surfaces and in visible light
